hero.title: Building the future with code and intelligence.
hero.description: High-performing Full-Stack Developer with a management background, strong frontend expertise, and practical backend experience. Based in Germany and ready for relocation across Germany.

cta.resumeHint: Open the English CV in a new tab

about.label: Identity
about.title: Who I Am
about.paragraph1: I am a high-performing Full-Stack Developer with a background in management and a strong focus on engineering scalable web solutions.
about.paragraph2: My profile combines frontend strength in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Redux, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS with practical backend work in Node.js, Express, SQL, REST APIs, testing, and deployment.

ai.label: AI Integration
ai.title: My AI Twin
ai.intro1: This site does not just show my AI skills. It demonstrates them live through the assistant placed beside my name in the hero section.
ai.intro2: Ask it about my work, tech stack, relocation across Germany, management background, or my frontend experience at Kunst Schule Berlin from January 2026 to April 2026.
ai.link: Open the assistant in the hero section
features: Easy to integrate into products and websites

items.description: Frontend experience at Kunst Schule Berlin, with a focus on interface quality, layout, and visual presentation.
Advanced full-stack program covering React, Node.js, TypeScript, Docker, and cloud platforms. Focus on building production-grade, AI-integrated web applications.
Language mediation DE <-> RU/UK in medical and social institutions. Assisted with digital applications, authority forms, and cross-cultural communication.
Strategic planning, leadership of cross-functional teams, public relations, budget planning, and international tournament organization.
Teaching and supervision, training of tournament participants, and horse care and management.
Academic foundation in analytical thinking, discipline, and scientific rigor that now informs systematic, precision-focused software development.

contact.label: Let's Connect
contact.title: Contact
contact.opportunities: I am currently open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and opportunities where I can contribute to scalable products with strong frontend and practical backend work.
contact.location: Germany, Oschatz - Ready for relocation across Germany and open to remote collaboration.

chat.welcome: Hello, I'm Anastasiia's AI assistant. I can tell you about her skills, projects, leadership background, relocation across Germany, resume details, and frontend experience at Kunst Schule Berlin.
chat.placeholder: Ask about skills, relocation across Germany, frontend experience at Kunst Schule Berlin, AI work, or career goals...
quickPrompts: Tell me about Anastasiia's tech stack
Is she ready for relocation across Germany?
Tell me about her frontend experience at Kunst Schule Berlin
How would you describe Anastasiia professionally?

guide.idleCaption: Hello, I am Nova, your guide. Press Tour and I will gently show you around.
guide.tourComplete: Tour complete. Press Tour anytime for another guided walkthrough.
guide.intro: Hello, I am Nova, Anastasiia's guide robot. I will walk you through the most important parts of this site.
guide.introBubble: Hello, I am Nova. I am ready to guide you through the most important parts of this site.
guide.tourStopped: Tour stopped. Press Tour whenever you would like a guided walkthrough.
